results.rendered_html:
pīvara a. (rā or rī f.) [pyai-ṣvarac saṃpra˚ dīrghaḥ]
1 Fat, large, stout, fleshy, corpulent;  R. 3. 8 ; 5. 65 ; 19. 32. 
2 Plump, thick.
— raḥ A tortoise.
— rī
1 A young woman.
2 A cow
Comp.
— stanī
1 a woman with fat or large breasts.
2 a cow with a large udder.
